Intro paragraph about SONAs.

Full list of SONAs

Administration Date Title Venue Legislature
Manuel L. Quezon November 25, 1935 Message to the First Assembly on National Defense Legislative Building, Manila First National Assembly, First Session
June 16, 1936 On the Country's Conditions and Problems Legislative Building, Manila First National Assembly, First Session
October 18, 1937 Third SONA Legislative Building, Manila First National Assembly, Second Session
Sergio Osmeña June 9, 1945 Message to Congress Lepanto Street, Manila First Congress of the Commonwealth
Ferdinand E. Marcos September 21, 1973 Report to the Nation Malacañan Palace
September 21, 1977 Crisis Government Rizal Park
Ferdinand R. Marcos Jr. July 25, 2022 First SONA Batasang Pambansa, Quezon City Nineteenth Congress, First Session
July 24, 2023 Second SONA Batasang Pambansa, Quezon City Nineteenth Congress, Second Session
July 22, 2024 Third SONA Batasang Pambansa, Quezon City Nineteenth Congress, Third Session
